series_metadata.series_description: Files containing records that are completed or provided by a medical/mental health consultant or consultant group. Files may contain contact information; licensures; forms that initiate business interactions; production data; work quality review; site visit information (for external consultants); sanction and complaint issues.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Contact and licensure records are updated regularly and file contains only the most current records. Files are maintained for seven (7) federal fiscal years following the last date of service to the agency. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Contact and licensure records are updated regularly and file contains only the most current records. Files are maintained for seven (7) federal fiscal years following the last date of service to the agency. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
